attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT DISTINCT
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(OBJECT_ID),0) FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LN_VW_RNWL_KFKA ) + DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY ST.PARENT_ID,ST.QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID ) 
AS OBJECT_ID,
PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID as PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID,
PARENT_ID as QUOTE_OBJECT_ID,
EXT_LIST_PRICE_GPL as EXT_LIST_PRICE_GPL,
EXT_LIST_PRICE as EXT_LIST_PRICE,
QUANTITY as QUANTITY,
FINAL_NET_PRICE as FINAL_NET_PRICE,
PART_NUMBER as PART_NUMBER,
ROUND(MONTHS_BETWEEN(CAST(LEFT(COALESCE(SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,  '3500-01-01'), 10) AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD' ), DATE '3500-01-01') ,
CAST(LEFT(COALESCE(SUBSCRIPTION_START_DT,  '1900-01-01'), 10) AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS  DURATION ,
CONTRACTUAL_DISC as CONTRACTUAL_DISC,
PROMO_DISC as PROMO_DISC,
NONSTANDARD_DISC as NONSTANDARD_DISC,
TRADE_IN_DISC as TRADE_IN_DISC,
MULTI_YEAR_DISC as MULTI_YEAR_DISC,
CAST(CAST(COALESCE(ST.CREATED_DATE,'1900-01-01 00:00:00' ) AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0))  as CREATED_DATE,
ST.CREATED_BY as CREATED_BY,
CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(ST.UPDATED_DATE,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) as UPDATED_DATE,
ST.UPDATED_BY as UPDATED_BY,
WEB_ORDER_ID as WEB_ORDER_ID,
EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_STD as EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_STD,
ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO as ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,
EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD as EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD,
ST.UPDATED_BY_KAFKA as UPDATED_BY_KAFKA,
cast(left (ST.UPDATED_ON_KAFKA,19) as timestamp(0)) as UPDATED_ON_KAFKA,
ST.OFFSET_NUMBER as OFFSET_NUMBER,
CAST(CAST(ST.EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) as EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER as EDW_CREATE_USER,
ST.PARTITION_NUMBER as PARTITION_NUMBER,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
COALESCE(SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT, -999)  AS PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
COALESCE(CHARGE_TYPE_NM,'UNKNOWN') AS CHARGE_TYPE_NM,
COALESCE(INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT, -999) AS INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
COALESCE(AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,-999) AS AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
COALESCE(BILLING_MODEL_NM,-999) AS  BILLING_MODEL_NM,
COALESCE(PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT, -999) AS PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
COALESCE(SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
CAST(LEFT(COALESCE(SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,  '3500-01-01'), 10) AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) AS SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,
CAST(LEFT(COALESCE(SUBSCRIPTION_START_DT,  '1900-01-01'), 10) AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SUBSCRIPTION_START_DT,
COALESCE(UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NM, 'UNKNOWN') AS UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NM,
CAST(LEFT(COALESCE(REQUESTED_START_DATE,  '1900-01-01'), 10) AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REQUESTED_START_DATE,
CAST(LEFT(COALESCE(REQUESTED_END_DATE,  '3500-01-01'), 10) AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) AS REQUESTED_END_DATE,
ST.INSTANCE_ID AS INSTANCE_ID,
ST.PRICE_LIST_ID AS PRICE_LIST_ID,
ST.QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID AS QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID,        
ST.QUOTE_STATUS AS QUOTE_STATUS,
' ' AS QUOTE_LINE_STATUS   ,
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_REFERENCE_ID              
FROM
(SELECT * FROM $$ETLVWDB.ST_SI_INT_RAW_CQ_QOT_LN_VW_RNWL_KFK ST
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY ST.PARENT_ID,ST.QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID  ORDER BY ST.EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC, ST.OFFSET_NUMBER DESC)=1) ST
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_CQ_SNGL_QUOTE_VW_RNWL_KFKA EL
ON ST.PARENT_ID = EL.OBJECT_ID
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LN_VW_RNWL_KFKA  EL
WHERE 
EL.QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID = ST.QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID 
AND ST.PARENT_ID = EL.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID)
AND CAST(CAST(ST.EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) >= (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS
where JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_EL_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LN_VW_RNWL_KFKA')
AND ST.QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID IS NOT NULL
